programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Brax takes a trip down memory lane. Cash delivers good news. Jo’s guilt spirals.

programme.title: Movie: Dakota
programme.desc: Kate, a widow who lost her husband in the war in Afghanistan, struggles to maintain her small-town farm with her daughter while also running the volunteer fire department. Stars Abbie Cornish..

programme.title: Netball: ANZ Premiership
programme.desc: Live coverage of the final match in Round 4 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Stars host the Magic from Pulman Arena in Auckland.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard try to advance the cause of women in science by speaking with junior high girls about their future careers.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A young man almost catches a train...right through his car. Speeders take risks near a school, and the last driver should definitely recognise a school zone.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne makes a condiment-based error for which he will no doubt be punished by the Taskmaster.

programme.title: Movie: The Gentlemen
programme.desc: Making moves to sell his valuable cannabis empire in the UK, an American kingpin sets off a series of plots, schemes and barefaced plays for his business. Stars Matthew McConaughey..

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Amy and Gina, with an assist from Jake, team up to help a victim of domestic abuse.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Lucy returns to work in the aftermath of the attack; an unexpected twist hinders the Liam Glasser case; a familiar face helps the team track down a killer.

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: Tyson and Shanika arrive home. Jalingbirri is dead and their home destroyed by the Vampire King.

programme.title: Marilyn Manson: Unmasked
programme.desc: Uncover the controversy surrounding notorious rock star Marilyn Manson, from his early days as a symbol of counterculture who shocked the public with his lyrics to the sexual assault allegations.

programme.title: Death On The Beach
programme.desc: When does paradise become a place of no return? Investigate the mysterious deaths of UK citizens abroad, as told by their loved ones back home.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A self confessed marijuana user crashes his motorbike into the back of a car in busy Melbourne.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 6am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri loves to swing on vines, but one day a vine breaks and she flies through the air and gets stuck in a tree. Who is going to rescue her?

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Alf gives advice to an old friend. Brax makes a tough decision. Tane is losing patience.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides Australia
programme.desc: Our crack-up Travel Guides head to Tropical North Queensland! They'll try white water rafting and aqua aerobics before exploring the Great Barrier Reef. How will they rate this Aussie destination?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After saving Springfield from a fire, Bart is rewarded with a driver's license. Guest starring Natalie Portman.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Let the battle begin! Leonard, Sheldon and Raj fight for tenure at the University - and the competition heats up when the girls get involved!

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie blows up at David. Levi fights to save a life. Harper gets an unexpected message.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage's headspace crashes.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A high-stakes face-off sees Tākapu and Kāhu go head-to-head. Then, an emotional elimination battle leaves one team heartbroken.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The FBI and LAPD join forces on a covert sting operation to protect Bailey; Wesley and Angela face tensions in their marriage when his campaign is threatened by a public scandal.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Bex races to catch Zack Lang, a class-obsessed serial killer who bludgeoned wealthy New Yorkers; Bex notices a sharp contrast between his victims in the past and present.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: A high-stakes face-off sees Tākapu and Kāhu go head-to-head. Then, an emotional elimination battle leaves one team heartbroken.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy take a group of high school CSI Explorer Scouts on a field trip, they embellish their role in solving cases and take their assignment a little bit too far.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Mr Throwback
programme.desc: Stephen is in a shooting slump, so Kimberly asks Danny for help finding the one person who can help.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Our remaining farmers visit the homes of their final two partners, as they prepare for their biggest decision yet…who to share the rest of their lives with.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 5am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou can’t sleep. Pania says she’ll sing them a song, as long as they stay awake for the whole thing.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!
